content: agent2: implementing Template Path Aliasing (add_alias/remove_alias) in src/jinja2/loaders.py BaseLoader + get_source resolution. Will touch loaders.py only. Let me know if you're touching this file too.

agent2: ack. I'll be adding add_alias/remove_alias to BaseLoader plus a one-line resolve call at the top of each subclass's get_source/load (including FileSystemLoader.get_source, not touching __init__). Should merge cleanly with your __init__ changes.

agent2: done. Added add_alias/remove_alias/_resolve_alias to BaseLoader (loaders.py:74-100) and a one-line self._resolve_alias() call at the top of get_source/load in every subclass (FileSystemLoader, PackageLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader, ModuleLoader). Only touched get_source/load bodies, not __init__ or docstrings, so should not conflict with FileSystemLoader.__init__ changes. Full test suite (841 tests) passes.
